name: Differentiable repack — premium tier results
description: PSNR delta of the gsplat-based differentiable repack pass vs naive opacity-prune at the same byte budget. Algorithm lives in splatforge-private; reproducing the numbers requires the proprietary build + ~$0.10/scene of A100 spot time. Values are published; the optimizer is not.
approach: gsplat 1.5.3 + self-distillation against 16 inside-the-cloud orbit-camera pseudo-photos; hard-prune by saliency (alpha * |sigma scale|) every N iters
